description: A dealership's back-office staff needs to process the title application and registration for a recently sold vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the signed bill of sale and power of attorney documents for the vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all necessary legal documents.

nodes.task_description: Complete the official state DMV forms for title application and registration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately fills out all required government forms.

nodes.task_description: Submit the paperwork and associated fees to the local DMV.

expected_outcome.value: The paperwork is successfully submitted for processing.
